items.title: Arsenal in 'difficult period' with shock FA Cup loss
items.summary: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta acknowledged his team is going through its first tough period of the season after being stunned by second-tier Southampton in the FA Cup.

items.title: Atlético rue VAR 'mistake' to overturn Barça red
items.summary: Diego Simeone criticised the controversial decision to overturn Gerard Martín's red card during Atlético Madrid's 2-1 defeat to Barcelona on Saturday.

items.title: Arbeloa: Blame for Real Madrid loss 'all mine'
items.summary: Coach Álvaro Arbeloa said responsibility for Real Madrid's dramatic 2-1 defeat at Mallorca was "absolutely, all mine."

items.title: Heat turns up in hunt for trophies for frantic & frazzled Arsenal
items.summary: Losing successive games for the first time this season has disintegrated Arsenal's unprecedented quadruple in two weeks.

items.title: It's no fluke, says Shearer, as Eckert's Saints target Wembley treble
items.summary: Fifty years after their one and only FA Cup success, underdogs Southampton are again stunning top-flight opposition - and doing so in style.

items.title: García: 'Ik ben dit seizoen al de derde coach, dan is er iets mis'
items.summary: Ajax-trainer Óscar García vond dat er tegen FC Twente te veel fout ging in balbezit. Ook waren de Tukkers in zijn ogen efficiënter voor het doel. Dat er weinig meer over is van de hoopgevende start tegen Sparta Rotterdam, daar wilde de Spaanse coach niet aan.

items.title: Haaland hits long-awaited Man City hat trick as pressure piles on Slot
items.summary: Erling Haaland's first Manchester City hat trick since August 2024 helped send his side to the FA Cup semifinals in a 4-0 thrashing of Liverpool.

items.title: VAR review: Should Man City have had another penalty in Liverpool thrashing?
items.summary: Man City thrashed Liverpool 4-0 in the FA Cup, but were they hard done by to not get another penalty?

items.title: Ontlading bij Van den Brom: 'Wij hebben gewoon een fantastisch team'
items.summary: FC Twente was zaterdagavond in Amsterdam te sterk voor Ajax . De Tukkers waren grote delen van de wedstrijd de bovenliggende partij en drukten dat ook uit in de score. Het zorgde voor blijdschap bij trainer John van den Brom, die trots was op zijn ploeg.

items.title: Nederlands getint Famalicão bezorgt Porto en Farioli flinke kater
items.summary: FC Porto heeft zaterdagavond voor eigen publiek twee kostbare punten verspeeld tegen Famalicão, bij wie Justin de Haas en Tom van de Looi in de basis startten. Kort nadat Porto-trainer Francesco Farioli uitzinnig het veld opliep na de late 2-1 van de koploper in de Liga Portugal ging het alsnog mis in de extra tijd.

items.title: RC Lens laat het liggen in strijd om Ligue 1-titel
items.summary: Na de interlandperiode stond er voor de voetballiefhebber direct weer een fraaie zaterdag te wachten. In Nederland werd er gevoetbald, maar ook Manchester City en Liverpool stonden tegenover elkaar. Atlético Madrid ontving Barcelona en Arsenal speelde de kwartfinale van de FA Cup. Lees hier alles terug.

items.title: Godts hard voor Ajax: 'Ongelooflijk waar we nu staan'
items.summary: De kans voor Ajax op Champions League-voetbal voor volgend seizoen kreeg een flinke knauw in de thuiswedstrijd tegen FC Twente , Mika Godts heeft er geen woorden voor dat de Amsterdammers buiten de topvier zijn gevallen.

items.title: Shea Charles stuns Arsenal to send Southampton into FA Cup semis
items.summary: The talk of a quadruple always felt fanciful, quashed by defeat at Wembley a fortnight ago, and now, after being humbled by second-tier Southampton, suddenly Arsenal are left fighting on just the two fronts. A late Shea Charles strike earned their fearless Championship opponents, transformed by Tonda Eckert from relegation candidates into prime promotion hopefuls within six months, a ticket to play under the arch in the FA Cup semi-finals at the end of this month. Continue reading...

items.title: Rohl won't watch title rivals as Rangers enjoy top spot
items.summary: As Rangers move to the top of the Scottish Premiership for the first time this season, head coach Danny Rohl is "convinced" they can finish the job.

items.title: European football: Barcelona stretch lead after shock defeat for Real Madrid
items.summary: Robert Lewandowski’s late winner sinks Atlético Real downed by Mallorca’s stoppage-time winner Barcelona’s Robert Lewandowski came off the bench to score a late winner in a 2-1 victory away to 10-man Atlético Madrid on Saturday that moved the defending champions seven points clear of Real Madrid – who suffered a shock defeat at Real Mallorca – at the top of La Liga. Barcelona had plenty of motivation after Real’s 2-1 loss at Mallorca earlier on Saturday, but it was the hosts who took the lead six minutes before the break through Giuliano Simeone. Continue reading...

items.title: Jorrel Hato kills Port Vale’s FA Cup dream in 64 seconds as Chelsea hit seven
items.summary: It will take more than a thumping FA Cup quarter-final victory over the worst team in League One to ignite Chelsea’s season as it enters the defining stretch. This was, at least, a step in the right direction. Or perhaps it was just good for the club to avoid any further chaos. The occasion was framed by Liam Rosenior’s decision to ban his vice-captain, Enzo Fernández, for the game and Chelsea’s next one, which is here against Manchester City in the Premier League next Sunday. The manager felt he had to act after Fernández’s none-too-subtle message to Real Madrid during the international break. Basically, he is bang up for joining them. Continue reading...

items.title: Liverpool's FA Cup capitulation ramps up pressure on Slot
items.summary: Nobody would have believed that 12 months on from Liverpool's title win, a fanbase so united behind its team and its manager would be, at best, apathetic as to whether Arne Slot remains in the job.

items.title: If Newcastle really want to be taken seriously, then Eddie Howe must join the exodus | Jonathan Wilson
items.summary: Most of what has gone wrong this season can be put down to poor recruitment – but the manager must share the blame Even when the fixture list was revealed last summer, it was perhaps predictable that the middle of March would represent the crisis point for Newcastle. If they had reached the Champions League quarter-finals and won the Tyne-Wear derby at St James’ Park, a lot of other frustrations could have been forgotten. Even better, that game against Sunderland would have had to be postponed had Newcastle reached a third Carabao Cup final since 2023. Those days of celebration a year ago feel a long time ago now, but the mood could easily have been very different. Newcastle were the better side in the home leg against Barcelona in the last 16 of the Champions League. Only the concession of a daft late penalty denied them victory and they were a persistent threat on the break in the first half of the away leg. Only in the second half of the second leg did the game get away from them: a 7-2 defeat made the difference between the sides seem much greater than it actually was. Continue reading...

items.title: Haaland's 'old-school' lesson for Liverpool as FA Cup record falls
items.summary: Manchester City have beaten Arsenal and taken apart Liverpool in their past two games and Erling Haaland's return to goalscoring form has laid down the gauntlet for the run-in.

items.title: Arne Slot’s shot at redemption fades away after showreel of embarrassments | Andy Hunter
items.summary: Spotlight intensifies on Liverpool’s manager, but what of a group of players who effectively surrendered against Manchester City? Budapest or bust it is, then, for Liverpool’s hopes of silverware this season and quite possibly Arne Slot’s prospects of remaining in his job, although thoughts of this team reaching a Champions League final appear ludicrous in light of their gutless exit from the FA Cup. A pity whistle on 90.04 from the referee, Michael Oliver, sounded an appropriate death knell for a pitiful performance by the fading Premier League champions. So much for a shot at redemption for Liverpool and Slot as a defining period of five matches in 16 days commenced in humiliating fashion. Continue reading...

items.title: 🎥 L'Union protégée d'un penalty flagrant ? "Si tu n'aimes pas les contacts, change de sport"
items.summary: L'Union Saint-Gilloise a eu très chaud en fin de match sur la charge de Kevin Mac Allister sur Keisuke Goto. L'Argentin estime toutefois qu'il n'y avait aucun penalty à siffler sur cette phase.

items.title: Le champion des Pays-Bas bientôt sacré : un joueur formé à Anderlecht et Genk change la physionomie du match
items.summary: Le club a connu un après-midi compliqué sur sa pelouse face au FC Utrecht, mais tout s'est finalement bien terminé.

items.title: Guilherme chanceux, Burgess en capitaine : les notes de l'Union contre Saint-Trond
items.summary: L'Union Saint-Gilloise s'est montrée solide pour venir à bout de Saint-Trond. Voici les cotes individuelles des joueurs pour leur prestation.

items.title: 🎥 Attendu à Naples, Romelu Lukaku était encore en Belgique aux côtés des jeunes Anderlechtois
items.summary: Comment l'histoire entre Naples et Big Rom va-t-elle se terminer ? C'est peut-être LA grande question pour les Diables Rouges à l'approche de la Coupe du monde aux États-Unis, au Canada et au Mexique.

items.title: Vincent Kompany a eu très chaud : le Bayern vit un finish spectaculaire
items.summary: Le Bayern Munich garde le rythme en tête de Bundesliga et peut désormais se tourner vers la grosse échéance qui l'attend en Ligue des Champions.

items.title: Hoopgevend nieuws bij Arsenal over Rode Duivel Leandro Trossard
items.summary: Er is hoopgevend nieuws gekomen vanwege Arsenal over Leandro Trossard. De Rode Duivel zou stilaan weer fit geraken.

items.title: Zonder veel spektakel: vreemd doelpunt maakt het verschil tussen Union SG en STVV
items.summary: Union SG is de Champions' Play-offs gestart met een zuinige maar verdiende overwinning tegen STVV. De Brusselaars namen na rust het commando helemaal over en slaan zo meteen een eerste kloofje.

items.title: Naast Mignolet verlaat binnenkort nog een speler Club Brugge die al jarenlang bij blauw-zwart rondloopt
items.summary: Er wordt afscheid genomen van spelers die lang bij Club Brugge voetbalden, ook al hebben ze niet allemaal dezelfde status. Simon Mignolet kwam onlangs in de actualiteit met de aankondiging van zijn pensioen. Met Sem Audoor verlaat binnenkort nog een vertrouwd gezicht Club Brugge.

items.title: CPL: Eindrondeticket uitgedeeld? Lommel, Lierse, RWDM en Club NXT kennen situatie met 2 speeldagen te gaan
items.summary: Eeder op de avond brak Beveren een record, maar er zat in de Challenger Pro League nog meer voetbal aan te komen. Zo zijn onder andere Lommel, RWDM, Lierse en Club NXT deze avond in actie gekomen. We geven u het overzicht van de vanavond afgewerkte wedstrijden.

items.title: 🎥 Lukaku laat zich opmerken: zijn zoontje moet hem ruzie met Napoli en onzekere toekomst doen vergeten
items.summary: Hoe gaat het aflopen tussen Napoli en Romelu Lukaku? Dat is misschien wel dé hamvraag voor de Rode Duivels richting het WK in de VS, Canada en Mexico.
